title: Types owning unmanaged resources should declare a finalizer
messageFormat: Add a finalizer (or use SafeHandle) so the unmanaged resource held by this type is released when Dispose is not called.
summary: A type that stores a raw handle such as an IntPtr and implements IDisposable owns an unmanaged resource. If a caller forgets to call Dispose, nothing reclaims that handle and the process leaks operating-system resources.
Provide a finalizer as a backstop that frees the handle during garbage collection, or, preferably, wrap the handle in a SafeHandle so the cleanup is guaranteed without writing a finalizer by hand.
